message:
refactor: split viewer.zig into smaller modules

- Extract render.zig (278 lines): frame rendering, cursor, toolbar
- Extract input_handler.zig (300 lines): keyboard input handling
- Extract mouse_handler.zig (287 lines): mouse event handling
- Update mod.zig to export new modules
- Fix resize timeout by sending Page.stopScreencast CDP command
- Add stopScreencastFull for complete shutdown vs resize

Reduces viewer.zig from ~2377 to 1633 lines (~32% smaller)
